message.thinking:

Question 1: Chapters: Does text list main sections? The text lists numbered items 1-9. So it lists sections. Yes.

But there might be missing or misordered numbers (9 before 8). That could be considered an issue. The text lists sections but not clearly "Chapters" heading. But it enumerates tasks. But could be considered not ideal formatting: numbers misordered, but still list main sections. I'll say yes but note misordering.

So compliance true.

Question 2: Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It lists tasks but not full description of contents of each section. The items describe tasks but not detailed. Might be enough. It says "Aprakstīt etalona uzdevumu..." etc. That is describing content. So yes.

Question 3: Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? The list gives tasks but not groupings or chapters. Might be hard to see general structure. I'd say partially but not clear. So compliance false.

Provide feedback accordingly.
